calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Mar-10-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

COUNSEL FOR PETITIONER MPS SERVICES, LLC's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

The unopposed motion for withdrawal of attorney of record is granted. The court will sign the order on the appropriate Judicial Council form.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights
Off Calendar May-19-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: PETITIONER MPS SERVICES, LLC'S Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Kimberly Ann Pomerantz, Esq., of Hoffman & Pomerantz, LLP, 310.371.2597, for and with Patrick Noonan, Transferor.
No other appearances.

Not argued/contested. At the outset, the court acknowledges Transferor's declarations and confirms with Transferor that he understands and agrees with the terms set forth in the Petition to Transfer Structured Settlement Payment Rights filed by Petitioner MPS Services. After additional discussion, the court approves the instant Petition for Transfer of Payment Rights. Counsel for Petitioner MPS Services, LLC, is to submit a proposed order to the court via email to contestdept301@sftc.org.

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CVA)
